---
title: "Business Running Case: Evaluating Personal Job Market Prospects in 2024"
subtitle: "analyzing Business Analytics, Data Science, and Machine Learning Trends"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    smooth-scroll: true
    page-layout: full
---

<iframe src="visuals/AD688 Business Running Case Present Slides.pdf" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
